title: Fix T1000-E puck LR1110 loramac-node build source path
description: Discovered during project-LICHEN-zte2.3 no-hardware validation. Building lichen/apps/puck for t1000_e/nrf52840 fails during CMake generation before application code links because lichen/drivers/lora/lr1110/CMakeLists.txt references missing loramac-node source modules/lib/loramac-node/src/radio/lr1110/lr1110_driver/src/lr1110_radio.c. Command: west build -p always -b t1000_e/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck -d build-puck-t1000-location-v1 -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen. Acceptance: t1000_e/nrf52840 puck app reaches compile/link or the T1000-E LR1110 puck target is explicitly marked unsupported with a tracked replacement path; no physical hardware required for build fix, physical radio smoke remains separate.
